differential_diagnoses: Disseminated fungal infection (e.g., Aspergillus or Candida spp.)
next_steps: Perform transesophageal echocardiography (TEE) to rule out endocarditis
Urgent ophthalmologic consultation for diagnostic vitrectomy or aqueous tap with culture and PCR
Perform CT-guided drainage or fine-needle aspiration of the hepatic mass
Send serum (1,3)-beta-D-glucan, galactomannan, and QuantiFERON-TB Gold
Obtain HIV testing and HbA1c to assess for underlying immunosuppression
Maintain broad-spectrum antibiotics (covering Klebsiella and Pseudomonas) and liposomal amphotericin B until definitive cultures return
